project_type: Next.js 14 App Router with TypeScript, transitioning from static HTML landing page + Python ML notebooks
build_system: pnpm for frontend, Next.js build system
test_framework: N/A for Phase 1 (landing page + docs), will use next build for verification
build_command: cd frontend && pnpm install && pnpm build
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm install in frontend/ directory, 2. Run pnpm build to verify Next.js compiles without errors, 3. Verify all expected files exist in the new project structure
setup_instructions: Node.js 22 and pnpm 10.28.1 are pre-installed. Run pnpm install in frontend/ directory.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - can install any packages from npm registry. Node.js v22.22.3, pnpm 10.28.1 available.
contribution_requirements: Working directory: /projects/sandbox/geoumkm-smart-3. Branch: feat/rebuild-notebooks-v4. DO NOT delete existing notebooks/data/models - move them to ml/ subdirectory.
key_patterns: Repository currently has flat structure with notebooks/, data/, models/, scripts/ at root. Existing GitHub Actions deploys to Azure Static Web Apps. Primary color #1F4E79 (deep blue), accent #10B981 (emerald green). Inter font. Indonesian product with English subtitles.
relevant_files: index.html (current landing page to be replaced)
directory_structure: Root: notebooks/, data/, models/, scripts/, docs/, .github/workflows/. Will reorganize to: frontend/ (Next.js), api/ (placeholder), ml/ (existing ML content), docs/, .github/workflows/
